creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 151941
patch

This patch do the following:
- update from 3.5.2 to 3.6.0
- add support for building with clang on 10+
- add support for AVFS option to conveniently step into archives
- Makefile cleanup

This patch depends on bug #196942 (adding port of avfs), please, don't commit before it's closed.
